review_text: {"verdict":"CHANGES_REQUESTED","summary":"The Maker lane is well bounded: paused-by-default packet, read-only workflow token, pinned actions, opaque ticket, no-tools model call, schema-synced output, and publish-time revalidation. However, verify_rendered_proposal uses hmac.compare_digest on str values; Python raises TypeError for non-ASCII str, so any proposal containing Korean text (the pilot's own test fixture is Korean) is denied at publish via the broad exception handler. The equality tests only exercise ASCII, so the byte-for-byte publication claim is unproven for the real target document. Fail-closed, but the lane cannot fulfill its stated purpose; several smaller availability and unverifiable-claim issues remain.","findings":[{"severity":"P2","status":"open","finding":"scripts/u1_maker.py verify_rendered_proposal calls hmac.compare_digest(body, expected) on str values. compare_digest only accepts ASCII str; non-ASCII content raises TypeError, caught by the broad handler as 'malformed trusted Maker state'. The target HANDOFF_NEEDED.md and the test fixture ('# 모델 인수인계') are Korean, so every realistic publish is denied. test_render_and_publish_reapply_current_content_binding uses only ASCII ('changed'), so the tests do not prove the publish equality path for actual content. Fail-closed availability bug, not a bypass; encode both sides to UTF-8 bytes before comparison and add a non-ASCII test."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"Fence-escape and marker checks ('~~~', '<!--', '-->', control chars) apply only to proposed_content. summary/verification/residual_risk are rendered unfenced and rely on core.clean_text plus a mention regex; clean_text is outside this diff, so it is unproven here that these fields cannot carry '<!--' text forging a proposal marker. A forged marker could only poison future duplicate-marker checks (deny-only), but explicit marker/fence rejection on all rendered fields would close the gap."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"Review and Maker workflows now share one concurrency group with cancel-in-progress:false; GitHub replaces an older pending run when a newer run queues, so a maker dispatch can silently evict a queued review dispatch (or vice versa), consuming that reservation attempt. SECURITY.md documents this as bounded availability requiring a fresh reservation; acceptable but operator-visible."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"verify_run_budget denies the entire lane if any workflow_dispatch run in the activation window has a display_title outside the opaque pattern, and fails if runs exceed one page (total_count != len). A single odd manual dispatch bricks all Maker publishes until the window resets. Deliberately fail-closed; availability impact only."},{"severity":"P3","status":"open","finding":"reviews/2026-07-22-executor-pr5-1983612-codex-adjudication.md asserts an 87-test quality gate pass, specific cross-model verdicts, and a diff digest that cannot be verified from the supplied diff. It correctly does not approve the remediation Head, but its factual claims are unsupported evidence, not proof."},{"severity":"none","status":"closed","finding":"Bridge per-model duplicate relaxation is sound: reserve_attempt independently rejects models outside ALLOWED_MODELS inside the ledger lock, legacy entries lacking requested_model match any model (fail-closed), and tests cover the duplicate-same-model denial, one-per-model allowance, unapproved-model rejection, and legacy fail-closed behavior."}],"verification":["config/u1-maker.json ships proposed_paused with an all-false activation object; validate_config pins limits, pilot path/Issue, model, action SHAs, and forbidden effects, and validate-ticket denies while paused","u1-claude-maker.yml is workflow_dispatch-only with actions:read/contents:read, persist-credentials:false, SHA-pinned actions, run_attempt==1 gating, and a single opaque numeric ticket input","The model call disables tools/MCP/settings and enforces an inline JSON schema; a test proves the inline schema equals schemas/u1-maker-output.schema.json","validate_result rejects oversized, unchanged, control-markup, tilde-fence, mention, and credential-shaped output; publish re-renders deterministically and requires marker and Base SHA binding","quality-gate.sh extends immutable-SHA, dispatch-only, and read-only-token greps (now including issues:write) to the Maker workflow","test_maker_uses_collision_checked_github_env_writer proves append_github_env fails closed on a forced delimiter collision before writing GITHUB_ENV"],"requirement_coverage":["Publication bounded to fixed private Issue #10 with content digest and executor provenance; no branch, PR, or source write path exists in the workflow or script","Budget enforcement: reservation-ledger caps (6 total / 2 per pilot), one-use opaque ticket, and public run-count recheck via verify_run_budget","Fail-closed behavior: paused packet, pause/kill-switch labels, lease expiry, SHA drift, duplicate markers, existing open PR, and malformed state all deny","Credential exposure controls: no issues:write on GITHUB_TOKEN, Season 2 token documented as Issues-only, secret-pattern rejection in output, no artifact retention, cleanup step","Cross-model bridge relaxation is allowlist-bound with legacy fail-closed dedupe and test coverage","Prompt injection surface bounded: no-tools model, delimited untrusted evidence, schema-validated output, mention and control-markup filtering before publication"],"residual_risk":["Publish path is nonfunctional for non-ASCII documents until the compare_digest type bug is fixed; all failures are denials, not writes","Unfenced summary/verification fields depend on out-of-diff clean_text semantics for marker/HTML rejection","Shared concurrency group can evict a queued run of the other lane, consuming a live reservation (availability only)","Repository admins retain the documented ability to alter activation state, environments, and secrets outside this diff"]}
reason: Unstructured Claude output is useful feedback but can never authorize approval.
